title: FOX News International to Expand Distribution on Roku Beginning January 31st
text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--FOX News International, FOX News Media's international streaming service, announced its expanded distribution on RokuⓇ, a leading TV streaming platform. Starting January 31st, the direct-to-consumer platform will see increased reach across Chile, Costa Rica, Germany, Ireland, Mexico, Panama and the United Kingdom.
